name: BTC Deep Trend Reset Continuation v1
thesis: BTC 4h trends often resume after deeper pullbacks that reset momentum without fully breaking medium-term structure. The edge should come from buying/selling after trend re-alignment following a meaningful reset rather than shallow touch-and-go continuation.
edge_mechanism: deeper pullback reset followed by trend continuation
invalidation_condition: If deeper reset continuation still fails to clear the trade floor or PF > 1.0 after costs, then BTC 4h continuation needs either a looser structural definition or different trade management.

long: Take profit: 1.5 * ATR_14 above entry for 50% size
Time-based de-risk: reduce 50% after 4 bars if unrealized gain < 0.75 * ATR_14
Final exit if Close crosses_below EMA_20 or at 10 bars
short: Take profit: 1.5 * ATR_14 below entry for 50% size
Time-based de-risk: reduce 50% after 4 bars if unrealized gain < 0.75 * ATR_14
Final exit if Close crosses_above EMA_20 or at 10 bars

regime_filter.detection_method: Require fast-over-medium trend alignment, a deeper ATR-scaled pullback into EMA_50, then close-based recovery through EMA_20 with positive momentum.
